title: Phase 2: Build the PWA + custom harness with /admin observability
summary: Ship a SvelteKit PWA powered by a custom @anthropic-ai/sdk harness with brain-aware tools (search, draft, capture), backed by an /admin route that surfaces per-tool latency and cost.
outOfScope: PWA quick-capture screen and iOS Shortcut (Phase 3)
Backups, dedup audit, fallback memory layer (Phase 4)
technicalConsiderations: Pre-phase decision pinned: SvelteKit (lighter footprint, single Node process for UI + API). Switch to Next.js only if a specific component/auth library forces it
New top-level pwa/ project; new compose service pwa; new Caddy vhost app.{domain}
New Postgres tables: brain.drafts, brain.tool_calls, brain.pending_episodes
Cookie auth path on app.{domain} for phone UX (bearer retained for API)
Risks: streaming + tool-call buffering, schema drift (use a migration tool from day one), cost-per-call attribution convention
